title: Crawler Crane Operator
description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Key Responsibilities:

  • Operate crawler cranes to lift, move, position, or place equipment and materials as per site requirements for civil engineering projects.
  • Perform pre-operation checks, inspections, and routine maintenance of crane equipment to ensure operational safety.
  • Interpret load charts, job orders, and lifting plans accurately.
  • Work closely with riggers, signalmen, and lifting supervisors to ensure safe lifting operations.
  • Comply with all MOM's regulations and safety guidelines.
  • Maintain accurate logs of operations, maintenance, and inspections.
  • Report any mechanical issues or safety concerns to the site supervisor promptly.
  • Adhere to project schedules and collaborate with site teams to meet operational deadlines.

Requirements:

  • Valid Crawler Crane Operator Licence issued by the Singapore Ministry of Manpower (MOM).
  • WSQ / BCA-approved training certification in crane operation.
  • Minimum 5 years of relevant experience operating crawler cranes on construction, marine, or oil & gas projects.
  • Strong understanding of load charts, lifting techniques, and safety protocols.
  • Ability to work under pressure and adapt to varying site conditions.
  • Good communication and teamwork skills.
  • Physically fit and alert, with strong attention to detail.

postedCompany.description:
Zhejiang Etone Specialized Foundation Engineering Co., Ltd.  Singapore Branch is a comprehensive enterprise that integrates engineering construction, engineering machinery manufacturing, and equipment leasing. The company holds several qualifications, including Class I General Contracting for Foundation Engineering, Class II General Contracting for Bridge Engineering, Class III General Contracting for Port and Coastal Engineering, and qualifications for international contracting projects from the People’s Republic of China. The company has a registered capital of 113.97 million RMB, and in the past five years, its highest annual output value reached 1.2 billion RMB. The company has more than 1000 employees, including 120 with senior and intermediate professional titles, 42 certified construction engineers and 15 certified safety officer.
      The company has independent R&D and manufacturing capabilities for piling machinery and possesses a large number of  advanced domestic equipment, such as fully hydraulic reverse circulation large-diameter engineering drilling rigs, rotary drilling rigs, hydraulic diaphragm wall grabs, double-wheel milling machines, multi-axis drilling rigs, hydraulic pile drivers, and intelligent pile planting machines. The company has the capability to independently undertake various types of large-scale bridge pile foundations, industrial pile foundations, foundation pit support, diaphragm walls and static drill root pile construction projects. It has a 5 provincial-level construction methods and holds over 100 national patents, providing clients with optimal geotechnical equipment and engineering solutions.
      We have also established subsidiaries in Singapore and Malaysia, and sincerely invite outstanding talents to join us.

If you are interested in our position, you can directly attach your resume and email it to us at etone-singapore@etonechina.com, or contact our office at phone number（65）6035 1625.
postedCompany.name: ZHEJIANG ETONE SPECIALIZED FOUNDATION ENGINEERING CO., LTD. Singapore Branch
